fields.label: AppLocker audit/block events

column.name: AppLockerEvents
column.description: AppLocker audited and denied execution events from the last 24h. Enriched with file metadata (description, version, product, hash, publisher, AppLocker rules) when the file is present on disk at collection time. Includes EventRecordId for KQL deduplication.

column.name: AppLockerEventTime
column.description: UTC time the AppLocker event was logged.

column.name: AppLockerEventRecordId
column.description: EventRecordId of the source event. Combine with DeviceName to deduplicate overlapping uploads in KQL.

column.name: AppLockerEventId
column.description: AppLocker event ID (8003/8006/8020 audited; 8004/8007/8022 denied).

column.name: AppLockerEventType
column.description: Audited (would have been blocked) or Denied (blocked in enforce mode).

column.name: AppLockerEventMessage
column.description: Full text of the Windows event log message.

column.name: AppLockerRuleCollection
column.description: AppLocker rule collection: Exe/Dll, Msi/Script, or PackagedApp.

column.name: AppLockerPolicyName
column.description: AppLocker policy name from the event (UserData.RuleAndFileData.PolicyName).

column.name: AppLockerRuleName
column.description: AppLocker rule name from the event (UserData.RuleAndFileData.RuleName).

column.name: AppLockerFilePath
column.description: Full resolved path of the file.

column.name: AppLockerFileName
column.description: Leaf file name from the event file path.

column.name: AppLockerFileHash
column.description: SHA-256 hash of the file (Get-FileHash when on disk; AppLocker event hash as fallback).

column.name: AppLockerFileDescription
column.description: File description from VersionInfo; null if file not on disk at collection time.

column.name: AppLockerFileVersion
column.description: File version from VersionInfo; null if file not on disk at collection time.

column.name: AppLockerProductName
column.description: Product name from VersionInfo; null if file not on disk at collection time.

column.name: AppLockerFileLength
column.description: File size in bytes; null if file not on disk at collection time.

column.name: AppLockerPublisher
column.description: Short publisher name (O= component of the certificate subject, e.g. 'MICROSOFT CORPORATION'); 'Unsigned' if not signed; null if file not on disk.

column.name: AppLockerFullPublisher
column.description: Full AppLocker publisher string from Get-AppLockerFileInformation (complete certificate DN); null if file not on disk.

column.name: AppLockerFileUseCount
column.description: Number of AppLocker events for this file path in the 24-hour collection window.

column.name: AppLockerPublisherRule
column.description: Ready-to-use AppLocker publisher rule XML from New-AppLockerPolicy; 'Unsigned Application' if unsigned; null if file not on disk.

column.name: AppLockerHashRule
column.description: Ready-to-use AppLocker hash rule XML from New-AppLockerPolicy; null if file not on disk.

column.name: AppLockerPathRule
column.description: Ready-to-use AppLocker path rule XML from New-AppLockerPolicy; null if file not on disk.

column.name: AppLockerSigned
column.description: 'Yes' if the file has a valid code-signing certificate, 'No' if unsigned; null if file not on disk.

column.name: AppLockerTargetUser
column.description: SID of the user the AppLocker rule was evaluated for.
